method.direct_outcome_structure: draw-vs-decisive expert plus home-vs-away conditional expert
method.same_date_leakage_control: all matches on a date predicted before any same-date result update
method.hyperparameter_selection: earliest two outer seasons fit; penultimate season selects l2 and pool weight
method.holdout_note: last-complete-season is a development holdout already viewed by earlier project experiments; not a pristine final test
